title: IdentitySpine
description: The canonical inner object of the digital soul: one lattice of 64 gates carrying three developmental inner axes. Every other tradition (zodiac, sefirot, enneagram, chakra, the twelve senses) is registered here only as a one-way PROJECTION (a presentation view) and is never a writable source of truth. The spine definition is a public, shared standard; a person's per-subject state lives in DigitalSoulIdentity and is private. Projections are symbolic mappings only and MUST NOT be presented as measured or physically derived values.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this spine definition.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this spine definition was created.

canonicalSpine.description: The committed canonical inner object. Locked to the 64-gate yi-globe; an enum so future spines can be registered without breaking existing data.

spineVersion.description: Version of the gate/axis layout, independent of contract specVersion.

axes.description: Definitions of the developmental inner axes every gate carries.

kind.description: ordinal = monotone progression (e.g. shadow..gift..siddhi); signed = directional vector (e.g. ascending/descending).

stops.description: Ordered, human-readable labels for the axis positions (e.g. ['shadow','gift','siddhi']).

range.description: Numeric range for the axis coordinate.

gates.description: The 64 gates of the lattice. Exactly 64.

label.description: Optional human-readable name of the gate's quality.

axisIds.description: Which inner axes this gate carries.

projections.description: One-way presentation views onto the spine. Projections render the spine into another tradition's vocabulary; they are never sources of truth and are never writable.

traditionId.description: The tradition this view renders into.

oneWay.description: Projections only read the spine outward; they never write back. Always true.

sourceOfTruth.description: A projection is presentation only and is never authoritative. Always false.

symbolic.description: The mapping is symbolic/cultural, not a measured or physically derived value. Always true.

view.description: Per-gate mapping into the tradition's symbol set.

symbol.description: The tradition-local symbol this gate projects to (e.g. a zodiac sign, a sefira, an enneatype).

privacyClass.description: The spine DEFINITION is a public shared standard. Per-subject state (DigitalSoulIdentity) carries its own, stricter privacy class.
